description_long: This is an adult pedestrian with a youthful appearance, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The individual is dressed in a casual outfit consisting of a short-sleeve graphic t-shirt and fitted, slightly distressed jeans. The person wears low-top sneakers and has a slim build. The hair is long, straight, and parted to one side, falling past the shoulders. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure's hands are relaxed and open. The overall look is modern and typical for an urban street environment.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian in a t-shirt and jeans, standing upright with arms outstretched. The figure has long straight hair and wears sneakers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the graphic t-shirt, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight fall of the hair, and the side seam of the jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, hair length, and the fit of the jeans from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm, and the side of the sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: casual t-shirt and jeans with low-top sneakers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair parted to one side
